title: PMO Analyst
description:
Job Description:

Role Overview:

  • The PMO Analyst will provide end-to-end PMO and operational support to the Project Manager and Delivery Lead, ensuring effective governance, coordination, reporting, and day-to-day project operations across the IT project lifecycle.

Key Responsibilities (non-exhaustive)

Project Governance & Controls:

  • Accurately capture meeting notes, minutes, key decisions, and action items; summarise, review, and circulate outputs in a timely manner.
  • Maintain and regularly update Risk, Issue, Action, and Decision (RAID) logs in consultation with the project team.
  • Support the upkeep and periodic updates of the Project Management Plan (PMP) to reflect agreed processes, governance, and delivery approach.
  • Manage structured storage, version control, and accessibility of all project documentation in line with project and organizational standards.

Reporting & Communications:

  • Coordinate, consolidate, and manage the development of project presentations and reports, including Weekly Status Reports, SteerCo / PSC decks, and management updates.
  • Work closely with functional, technical, and delivery teams to gather inputs, ensure consistency of messaging, and maintain presentation quality.
  • Support effective stakeholder communications across the programme.

Resource & Onboarding Management:

  • Manage onboarding and offboarding activities for project resources, coordinating with HR, IT, and security teams as required.
  • Maintain a comprehensive resource inventory, including roll-on and roll-off dates, roles, skills, and team allocations.
  • Provide visibility and tracking support for resource utilisation and upcoming resourcing needs.

Operational & Administrative Support:

  • Set up project meetings, schedule sessions, and arrange or book meeting rooms and facilities as required.
  • Support office and project room logistics, including coordination of supplies and other operational needs.
  • Assist with workshop planning, key project meetings, and programme events.

Project Support:

  • Provide day-to-day support to the Project Manager and Delivery Lead on open tasks, follow-ups, and coordination activities.
  • Support adherence to agreed project governance, standards, and delivery timelines.

Requirements:

  • Poly grad preferred.
  • Need to pass security clearance before joining.

Skills & Experience:

  • Understanding of IT project lifecycles and common project management methodologies (e.g. Waterfall)
  • Strong documentation, note-taking, and summarisation skills.
  • Proficient in Microsoft tools, including Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and MS Teams.
  • Strong organisational and coordination skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities.
  • Effective communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Experience as Executive Assistant with above experience will be useful.

Preferred Experience:

  • Prior experience in a PMO or project support role within IT or digital transformation programmes.
  • Experience supporting senior governance forums such as SteerCo / PSC meetings.
  • Detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working in a fast-paced delivery environment.

postedCompany.description:
KRIS INFOTECH PTE. LTD.

We partner with the IT industry providing comprehensive short and long-term technology & staffing solutions. We offer different options, to enable clients to optimize their human resources and at the same time reduce the risk and total cost of ownership. 

Under our Professional Services , we serve our client's manpower needs by providing smooth talent pipeline with flexible partnering options.

We have been very successful in reducing ownership costs and recruitment turnaround time for our clients.  

  • Our offerings are tailored around the identified domain, allowing us the ease to service our clients with domain experts.
  • We primary source talents from Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, Australia, Hong Kong and Japan
  • We have been supporting our clients regionally for business languages other than English viz. Mandarin, Thai, Japanese.

 

Our IT Professional Services include:

ü  Agency Contract

ü  Contingency Search

ü  Retained Search

 

Our Value-Added Services include:

-       Managed Payroll Services

-       Re-batching & Vendor Consolidation

-       Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO)

 

Our Focus: Technology Stack

  • ERP and CRM
  • Datawarehousing
  • Mobile and Web
  • Microsoft (.Net & Sharepoint)
  • Midrange (AS/400)
  • Infra (Networking, Sys Admin, DBAs, Storage, Telephony)
  • Subject Matter Expert, Project Managers and Business Analyst

 

Under our Technology Services brand – we specialize in IT Systems Integration encompassing the wide expanse of software, hardware and network technologies to enable businesses.

By combining best of breed solutions, cutting edge technologies and our proven processes, we aim to enhance your business productivity.

With time, we have invested in and collaborated with few specific Technology companies in the region to enhance our Technology Services.

We are very pleased bring to you the following FOUR service offerings:

 

ü  Big Data Consulting

ü  SAP Development Services

ü  Oracle E-Business Suite Services

ü  GRC Consulting
